description: The aerodynamics group has finalized the external shape of the eCRM-001 transport aircraft concept. A structural engineer needs to define the preliminary main wing box (a front spar, a rear spar, and a set of structural ribs) for structural analysis. The master geometry file is at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3. A specification document is on the Desktop at /home/ga/Desktop/structural_layout_spec.txt. Open the model, read the specification, and apply the structural layout to the Main Wing component ONLY (do not modify the tails). Save the updated structural model as /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM-001_structural.vsp3.
